title: Undoing Changes Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git version control patterns.

questions.question: Which command is used to discard local changes from a specific file in Git?
Regarding undoing changes, which Git command is used to unstage changes from the staging area?
Which Git command is used to record a new commit that reverts the changes from a specific, previous commit?
Which Git command is used to update the most recent commit with new changes or a new message?
